# KlubPro

KlubPro is a sports club management platform designed for volunteer-run grassroots and amateur sports clubs in Australia.

## Overview

KlubPro provides the operating system for grassroots sport — bringing together availability tracking, team selection, social media graphics generation and sponsor promotion into a single modern web platform.

Primary positioning: "The operating system for grassroots sport."
Core phrase: "Taking sports clubs to the next level."

## Target Users

- Grassroots and amateur sports clubs
- Volunteer committee members and club administrators
- Club presidents and treasurers
- Team selectors, coaches and captains of selectors
- Players and club members
- Sports clubs across Australia

## Core Features

- **Player Availability Tracking** — Automated reminders and centralised availability collection so selectors know who is available before selection day
- **Team Selection** — Intelligent team selection tools built around real availability and squad data; publish team sheets directly to players
- **Social Media Graphics** — Automatic generation of professional-quality graphics (team announcements, match results) ready to post to club social media channels
- **Sponsor Promotion** — Systematic inclusion of sponsor logos and branding across all generated club content; track sponsor exposure

## Supported Sports

- Cricket
- Football (Soccer / Association Football)
- Australian Rules Football (AFL)
- Rugby Union
- Rugby League
- Hockey
- Netball

## Contact

Email: info@klubpro.com
